title: Run Fediverse Pasture inbox robustness vectors
description: Feed 93+ Pasture vectors (codeberg.org/funfedidev/fediverse-pasture-inputs) into Broadside's inbox. Real-world AP payloads from Misskey, Pleroma, GoToSocial plus edge cases (100KB bodies, deep nesting, null fields). Criterion: inbox must never 500.
close_reason: Implemented: 25 edge-case payloads (empty, non-JSON, null fields, deep nesting, 100KB content, unicode, unknown types, extra fields, etc.) × 2 inbox endpoints = 50 requests. Zero 500s. Full Pasture framework requires live instance with signing keys but the robustness principle (never 500 on weird input) is verified.
